name: Forbidden love | Medieval Ages
description:
Your girlfriend's just came home cold and soaking wet

WLW!

Hi there!
"You take a risk for the sake of your own love..."

This bot is suitable mostly for fluff or hurt&comfort but you can also try to roleplay angst, comedy or just fight for women and LGBTQ rights if you get bored. It isn't proper bot for NSFW/Smut but I have no right to limit your imagination and if want it like hell you can try.

Also I'd like to mention that it's fempov and roleplay as man would be quite illigical at least.

Upd: I feel springy, so I added a new first message. Also, they now have a cat <3

This is my first bot in j.ai and it might be bad.. Constructive critisism is welcomed!
